properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I walk through deep waters I know that you will be with me When I'm standing in the fire I will not be overcome Through the valley of the shadow, I will not fear

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am not alone I am not alone You will go before me You will never leave me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the midst of deep sorrow I see your light is breaking through The dark of the night will not overtake me I am pressing into you Lord, you fight my every battle And I will not fear

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You amaze me Redeem me You call me, as your own

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You re my strength, you're my defender You're my refuge in the storm Through these trials You're always been faithful You bring healing to my soul
